query:
INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, hasStock, sortOrder) 
SELECT 1, c.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, 'active', true, p.sortOrder
FROM categories c
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'Angus Premium' as name, 'Pão brioche, hambúrguer angus 180g, queijo cheddar, cebola caramelizada e molho especial' as description, 38.90 as price, 1 as sortOrder
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Blue Cheese Burger', 'Pão australiano, hambúrguer 180g, queijo gorgonzola, rúcula e geleia de pimenta', 42.90, 2
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Trufado', 'Pão brioche, hambúrguer 180g, queijo brie, cogumelos salteados e azeite trufado', 45.90, 3
  UNION ALL SELECT 'BBQ Pulled Pork', 'Pão brioche, hambúrguer 150g, pulled pork, queijo cheddar e molho BBQ', 44.90, 4
) p
WHERE c.name = 'Hambúrgueres Gourmet' AND c.establishmentId = 1;
